name: Carousel
description: A carousel with motion and swipe built using Embla Carousel.
whenToUse: Use for image galleries, testimonial sliders, product showcases, and content that needs horizontal scrolling.
codeExample: import { Carousel, CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselNext, CarouselPrevious, } from "@/components/ui/carousel" import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card" export function CarouselDemo() { return ( {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, index) => ( {index + 1} ))} ) }
